SEARCH
Package com.falkordb

Interface Graph

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
All Known Subinterfaces:
GraphContext, GraphContextGenerator
public interface Graph extends Closeable
An interface for a FalkorDB graph.

      query - Cypher query
      timeout - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a result set

    • query

      ResultSet query(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Executes a cypher query with parameters.

      Parameter values are safely encoded as Cypher literals, so caller-supplied values cannot break out and inject Cypher — always pass untrusted input as a parameter rather than concatenating it into query. Values must be an encodable type (null, String, Character, Boolean, a boxed integer or floating-point number, a BigInteger within signed 64-bit range, or an array/List/Map of such values, where every Map key is a String); other types (including BigDecimal), out-of-range integers, non-finite floating-point values, cyclic containers, non-String map keys, invalid parameter names, and a null query or params are rejected with IllegalArgumentException. This does not cover the query text itself, dynamic labels/identifiers, or procedure names.

      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query. Must not be null.
      params - parameters map. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a result set.

    • readOnlyQuery

      ResultSet readOnlyQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters.
      Parameters:
      query - Cypher query.
      params - parameters map.
      Returns:

    • query

      a result set.

      ResultSet profile(String query)
      Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.

      query - Cypher query
      Returns:
      a result set with execution plan and performance metrics

      a result set with execution plan and performance metrics

      args - - procedure arguments
      kwargs - - procedure output arguments

      result set with the procedure data
